human_actions_pending.context: Google and GitHub OAuth require client IDs and secrets from their respective developer consoles. Without these, the OAuth login buttons will redirect but the flow will fail at authorization.

decisions.rationale: For OAuth-only users without local passwords
Best UX to link Google/GitHub accounts if email matches existing
App factory requires config-loaded blueprint creation, not module-level

next_action: All 5 phases complete. Milestone v1.0 ready for verification / review.
context_notes: Phase 5 executed inline (Copilot sequential mode). Flask-Dance import path corrected from .backend.sqla to .storage.sqla. All 36 tests pass. OAuth buttons are rendered but non-functional without provider credentials in .env.
